headline: Elevance Health Inc. (ELV): Billionaire Seth Klarman Backs This Health Company
summary: Elevance Health Inc. (NYSE:ELV) is one of the 15 Best Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Seth Klarman. Even though Baupost Group has trimmed a stake in Elevance Health Inc. (NYSE:ELV) by 4% during the fourth quarter of 2025, compared to filings for the previous quarter, the holding still represents the fourth-largest position of the […]
